rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Gov't Code §2001.122 governs admissibility of child abuse victim hearsay in contested case hearings. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 2001.122. HEARSAY STATEMENT OF CHILD ABUSE VICTIM.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and this hearsay rule.
